description_long: This helmet is reminiscent of a Roman or Greek-style military helmet, featuring a prominent red crest running from front to back along the top. The main body of the helmet is constructed from a dark, metallic material with a slightly worn, matte finish, giving it an aged and battle-ready appearance. The helmet has a rounded dome shape with extended cheek guards on both sides, providing additional facial protection. The red crest is textured and appears to be made from a different material, possibly horsehair or a synthetic equivalent, and is mounted securely along the helmet's ridge. The lower edge of the helmet flares outward slightly, and the cheek guards are attached with visible rivets or fasteners. There are no visible logos, graphics, or ventilation holes, and the helmet is devoid of any modern features such as visors or padding.
description: A dark metallic helmet with a prominent red crest and extended cheek guards, styled after ancient Roman or Greek military headgear. The surface is matte and worn, with no visible graphics or modern features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red crest running centrally and the symmetrical cheek guards extending downward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the red crest and the profile of the cheek guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the red crest and the rounded back of the helmet.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the red crest's length and the right cheek guard's profile.
